About

Clarla Beauty

Makeup, hair, and hands-on lessons for real people and real occasions—rooted in skill, calm energy, and care.

Hi, I’m Clarla—founder of Clarla Beauty.

With over a decade in makeup and hair, I built this studio around one idea: beauty should feel personal, calm, and completely you. Every appointment is tailored to your features, your event, and your comfort—not a one-size-fits-all template.

Whether you are preparing for your wedding, a shoot, or a lesson, my team and I focus on polished techniques, thoughtful products, and clear communication from consultation to the final touch-up.
